content.text: I'll evaluate the candidates against the Topic of space exploration and astronomy.

posts.snippet: NASA's four Artemis II astronauts completed a full rehearsal of their crewed lunar flyby, practicing re-entry and recovery procedures ahead of next year's launch — a key milestone in the return to human deep-space exploration.

Astronomers used James Webb Space Telescope spectroscopy to confirm the most distant galaxy yet observed, seen as it appeared just 290 million years after the Big Bang, setting a new cosmic distance record.

is II crew completes lunar flyby rehearsal** — a space exploration mission story about crewed deep-space fl

ight preparation.

space telescope.

- **Retail chain beats quarterly earnings estimates** — unrelated business/finance news

.

No duplicates were present among the selected artic
les. The candidate feed did not provide any image URLs, so hero images were left empty.
